title: Player Plates (Obsidian Plates)
description: Adds obsidian and mossy pressure plates
body:
This mod adds an obsidian pressure plate and a mossy cobblestone pressure plate

The obsidian plate can only be triggered by players and is able to withstand tnt

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/272/148/java_2019-01-18_01-40-41.png)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/272/149/java_2019-01-19_23-23-36.png)

The mossy cobblestone plate can only be triggered by items & mobs

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/272/150/java_2019-01-18_01-40-56.png)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/272/151/java_2019-01-19_23-23-18.png)

#### Modpack Usage

 Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
